pages.headline: OFF THE WOODWORK

pages.headline: How this Story was built
pages.body: Final score Celtic 4–0 Kilmarnock. Goals: 9' Johnny Kenny · 50' Kieran Tierney · 84' Daizen Maeda · 92' Arne Engels. 10 moments selected from 102 raw events by importance ranking.
